records.Outcome / Description: Local manufacturing of solar water energy efficient pumps
records.Progress: Initial MoU signed for production of energy efficient water pumps; Pakistani side paid 2 visits to China. Chinese side has recently shifted focus towards donkey slaughterhouse in Gwadar; both sides in discussion for this new area of cooperation.

records.Outcome / Description: Collaboration on agricultural UAVs and green AI technologies
records.Progress: Initial hurdles due to non-issuance of export license for dual-use UAVs; license issued to Chinese company on 25 February 2026. Pakistani side working on conversion of MoU to JV (under process); some machinery parts imported from China.

records.Chinese company: Blue Eagle Airlines (Beijing) Investment and Development Co. Ltd
records.Outcome / Description: Manufacturing of food safety and health rapid test kits
records.Progress: MNFSR arranged meeting between parties on 17 April 2026; Pakistani side presented proposal to Chinese company but no response received. MNFSR asked Pakistani side to share the problem with the Ministry for follow-up via Mission in China; email awaited.

records.Outcome / Description: Provision of technical support and establishment of association's regional office
records.Progress: MNFSR with Consulate General Chengdu organized multiple meetings; Chinese side agreed to open regional office alongside Baobo International. Chinese delegation visited during April–May 2026 in Islamabad, established regional office now running successfully as supply chain office.

records.Chinese company: Beijing GXP Investment Consulting Co. Ltd (AeMoney)
records.Outcome / Description: Export of dairy products (dry buffalo milk) to China
records.Progress: Chinese company considering proposal shared by Pakistani company on 02-04-2026; MNFSR asked Pakistani side to mail the Ministry for onward follow-up with Mission in China. Email from Pakistani side awaited.

records.Outcome / Description: Modernization and upgrading of animal husbandry, dairy production and export of buffalo milk
records.Progress: Both sides failed to develop consensus on terms despite multiple meetings under MNFSR and embassy; in mid-May both parties conveyed they do not wish to proceed and MoU added to list of cancelled MoUs as per directions of SAPM on Industries and Production.

records.Outcome / Description: Cooperation in agricultural cultivation, trade of agricultural products and deep processing of agri fertilizers
records.Progress: Chinese company working on a similar project in Guangxi, China; will move to Pakistan only once Guangxi results are obtained. Meeting between both sides not yet conducted.

Consultations ongoing for lease of 5-acre land in Gwadar South Free Zone with China Overseas Ports Holding Company (COPHC); recent surge in security concerns in Baluchistan has halted progress, moving at slower pace as of 1 July 2026.

records.Chinese company: AI NONG Home Brand Management (Chongqing) Co., Ltd
records.Outcome / Description: Export of fresh and frozen products i.e., fishmeal, seafood and dried fish
records.Progress: Chinese side's visit with technical experts expected May–June to check project feasibility but not conducted due to personal reasons; MNFSR asked Pakistani side to send problem statement via email for follow-up with Mission in China; email awaited.
Castor oil samples shared with Chinese side on 10 March 2026; sample returned in April 2026 with suggestions for quality improvement. Pakistani side currently complying with the suggestions.
Both parties in continuous contact regarding export of broken rice; export order to be finalized after this year's crop harvest, expected October 2026.

records.Chinese company: Chengdu Han Cheng Hang International Trading Co. Ltd
records.Progress: Pink salt sample shared in January 2026; GACC has changed policy for import of edible salt but allowed industrial salt imports from Pakistan (GACC registration required, being considered by Pakistani side). Raw salt import to China expensive vs refined; work ongoing; MoU at slower pace.

records.Chinese company: Chengdu Han Cheng Hang International Trading Co. Ltd.
records.Progress: Same as above: GACC policy change for edible salt; industrial salt route via GACC registration under consideration; cost challenge for raw salt vs refined; work ongoing at slower pace.

records.Chinese company: Xinjiang Xueyu Plateau Import and Export Trade Co. Ltd
records.Sector: Fruits & Vegetables Cultivation, Packaging, Processing & Exports
records.Outcome / Description: Export of pine nuts to China
records.Progress: Export of pine nuts amounting to USD 10 million reported in 2025; both parties will re-engage at onset of pine nut harvesting (expected end of 2026) to set export goals for the year. No issue reported.

records.Sector: Fruits & Vegetables Cultivation, Packaging, Processing & Exports
records.Progress: Per contract terms, Pakistani side will buy chilies from farmers and export to China; specific targets to be decided at onset of chili crop harvest in August 2026. Pakistani side will proceed with MoU in August.

records.Sector: Fruits & Vegetables Cultivation, Packaging, Processing & Exports
records.Progress: MoU dormant due to slow price negotiations; LTEC reluctant to proceed on offered price for the chillies, hence MoU in dormancy until then.

records.Chinese company: Blue Eagle Airlines (Beijing) Investment and Development Co. Ltd
records.Outcome / Description: Construction of donkey breeding farm in Punjab and slaughterhouse in Gwadar
records.Progress: Negotiations for export of donkey meat to China in progress; Chinese side awaiting approval of first meat consignment from already registered Chinese company from Pakistan before going further. MoU active but at slower pace.

GACC raised queries; AHC (line department of MNFSR) contacted the Pakistani company; response shared with Mission for onward transmission to GACC in May, reminder dated 18 June 2026; response still awaited. MNFSR also contacted Beijing consulate counterpart; response awaited.
Same as above (GACC queries; response transmitted via Mission in May with 18 June 2026 reminder; responses awaited).
Same as above (GACC queries; response transmitted via Mission in May with 18 June 2026 reminder; responses awaited).
Due to regulatory issues regarding non-existence of any protocol between Pakistani and Chinese side for export of poultry products, both sides suggested cancelling the MoU.
Due to FMD related issues, MoU currently dormant as PSDP 'Animal Disease Surveillance Program' project is at initial phase; both sides have already suggested cancelling the MoU.

records.Chinese company: Sichuan Sundaily Farm Ecological Food Co. Ltd (Techlex)
records.Progress: GACC concerns responded by Pakistani side and forwarded to Embassy via email in May 2026; response not yet received. AHC actively pursuing with embassy, reminder sent 18 June 2026; MNFSR also communicated matter to Beijing counterpart on 1 July 2026, awaiting response.
records.Bottleneck: Regulatory issues related to FMD & Avian Influenza compliance

records.Outcome / Description: Local harvest of hybrid vegetable seeds (tomato) – Thatha, Guju & Larkana
records.Progress: Trials harvested end of April; based on successful yield and adaptation of Chinese tomato variety, Pakistani side applied to FSC&RD for varietal registration in May 2026. MNFSR asked for application details for follow-up with FSC&RD, shared via email.

records.Outcome / Description: Local marketing and export of canola oil – Bhakkar, Piplaan, Gujranwala
records.Progress: Chinese canola seed variety 'HC-021C' introduced to check adaptability and yield; after successful adaptation, introduced in local market to check demand. Based on market results, Pakistani side intends to export internationally.

records.Outcome / Description: Watermelon seed production technology transfer to Pakistan
records.Progress: Both sides in contact for import of watermelon seed variety from China; Chinese side earlier committed to send seed samples but could not due to personal reasons. Chinese representative 'Ms Kathy' plans to visit Pakistan 18–19 July 2026; way forward after visit.

records.Outcome / Description: Local harvest of hybrid vegetable seed (tomato, chili, sweet pepper) – Sargodha & Attock regions of Punjab
records.Progress: Adaptability trials of different vegetables undergoing; based on results of two consecutive years, overall response of Chinese varieties will be evaluated and proceeded forward accordingly.

Invoice against 7 cotton seed varieties received 25-03-2026; DPP contacted for import permit dated 30-03-2026. As of 1 July 2026, DPP has not issued the permit; MNFSR asked Pakistani representative to write formal email to the Ministry for follow-up with DPP.
Imported seeds undergoing adaptation trials; feasibility and productivity to be evaluated based on results of adaptation experiments.

records.Chinese company: Dayu GDSP Alliance Irrigation Group Co. Ltd & Guangdong SinoPak Agro Co. Ltd
records.Outcome / Description: Establishment of drip irrigation manufacturing factories
records.Progress: Technical details, location and feasibility studies shared by Pakistani side, under review by Chinese side; regular online meetings conducted. Overall MoU progressing slowly.
Pakistani side reported no communication from Chinese side despite multiple messages; embassy confirmed Chinese side is not interested in continuing. Pakistani side also suggested cancelling the MoU.
